summary: This tool appears designed for general manipulation during surgery requiring precise but not necessarily speedy actions; its primary function involves providing support for more complex tasks such as tooth extraction, hysteroscopy, or discectomies while maintaining high levels of accuracy regardless whether procedure moves quickly or slowly depending upon immediate needs at hand.
